title: IT Equipment Request
description: End-to-end process for requesting, approving, and provisioning IT equipment for employees.

roles.label: Employee
roles.description: Submits the equipment request and receives the provisioned equipment.

roles.label: Line Manager
roles.description: Reviews and approves or rejects equipment requests for their team.

roles.label: IT Team
roles.description: Provisions, configures, and deploys equipment to the employee.

roles.label: Equipment Supplier
roles.description: External vendor that fulfils purchase orders for new equipment.

roles.label: Email Notification
roles.description: Automated email alerts sent at key process milestones.

steps.title: Submit Equipment Request
steps.description: Employee completes the equipment request form specifying the type of equipment needed, justification, and any urgency.

roleAssignments.note: Initiates the request via the IT service portal.

actions.label: Complete request form
actions.notes: Include equipment type, specification requirements, and business justification.

steps.title: Ticket Created and Notification Sent
steps.description: The service desk system creates a ticket and sends an automatic notification to the line manager for approval.

roleAssignments.note: Sends approval request email to line manager.

actions.label: Generate support ticket
actions.notes: System auto-creates a ticket with request details and SLA target.

actions.label: Send approval request email
actions.notes: Includes request summary, cost estimate, and a link for the manager to approve or reject.

lanes.title: Approval
lanes.laneNote: Approval authority may vary by equipment cost. Items over budget threshold require additional sign-off.

steps.title: Review Request
steps.description: Line manager reviews the equipment request, checking justification and budget availability.

actions.label: Review and decide
actions.notes: Approve, reject with reason, or request more information from the employee.

steps.title: Notify Outcome
steps.description: System sends notification of the approval decision to the employee and, if approved, to the IT team for fulfilment.
steps.stepNote: Rejected requests include the manager's reason so the employee can resubmit if appropriate.

roleAssignments.note: Creates fulfilment task in the service desk system.

actions.label: Create fulfilment task
actions.notes: If approved, generate a fulfilment task assigned to IT Team.

steps.title: Procure or Allocate Equipment
steps.description: IT team checks stock availability. If in stock, allocates from inventory. If not, raises a purchase order with the supplier.
steps.stepNote: Lead time for purchase orders is typically 5 to 10 working days.

roleAssignments.note: Checks inventory and procures if needed.
Fulfils purchase order when stock is unavailable internally.

actions.label: Check stock and procure
actions.notes: Allocate from inventory or raise purchase order with supplier. Refer to procurement policy for approval thresholds.

steps.title: Configure Equipment
steps.description: IT team configures the equipment with required software, security settings, and network access.

roleAssignments.note: Handles setup, imaging, and software installation.

actions.label: Image and configure
actions.notes: Apply standard build, install role-specific software, join to domain.

steps.title: Deploy to Employee
steps.description: IT team delivers the configured equipment to the employee and confirms handover.

roleAssignments.note: Delivers and sets up at employee's workstation.

actions.label: Deliver and confirm
actions.notes: Employee signs off on receipt. IT updates asset register.

steps.title: Close Ticket
steps.description: Service desk ticket is marked as resolved and closed.

roleAssignments.note: Automatically closes ticket after confirmed delivery.
Sends closure confirmation email to employee and manager.

actions.label: Resolve and close ticket
actions.notes: Update ticket status to resolved, record the asset tag, and close.

actions.label: Send closure confirmation
actions.notes: Confirm to employee and manager that the request is complete and equipment has been deployed.
